name: list_items
description: List all content records (items) belonging to a specific content model (item type). Returns paginated results with all field values. Use the 'filter' parameter to narrow results by field values, publication status, or date ranges. Results are ordered by creation date descending by default.

parameters.name: filter[type]
parameters.description: Filter by item type (model) API key. Example: 'blog_post'. Required to scope results to a specific model.

parameters.name: filter[fields][field_api_key][eq]
parameters.description: Filter records where a specific field equals a value. Replace 'field_api_key' with the actual field API key.

parameters.name: filter[query]
parameters.description: Full-text search query across all localized text fields of the records.

parameters.name: page[offset]
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination. Default: 0.

parameters.name: page[limit]
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return per page. Default: 20, max: 500.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Field to order results by, with optional direction. Format: 'field_api_key_ASC' or 'field_api_key_DESC'. Use '_created_at_DESC' for newest first.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Set to 'current' for draft content or 'published' for published content only. Default: 'published'.
